facts: LINDE + WIEMANN US Inc. operates a facility in Lavonia, Georgia.
The facility is located at 1720 Knox Bridge Crossing Rd, 30553, Lavonia / GA – US.
The Georgia site covers an area of 4,100m².
The facility is accessible via exit 177 on I-85 South from Atlanta or I-85 North from Greenville.
Drivers approaching from Atlanta take exit 177, turn right at the end of the ramp, and left at a 4-way stop sign where the plant is visible on the left-hand side.
Drivers approaching from Greenville take exit 177, turn left at the end of the ramp, and left at a 4-way stop sign where the plant is visible on the left-hand side.

links.context: Contact phone number for Lavonia facility
